title: Track Time for person
excerpt:
I think it would be a good idea to implement a widget that makes me see for every person on the team the time they spent in a period of time on a task. 
Example: 
Filter “person” 
Project 1 - Task 1 - From 08:00 to 09:30 …

posts.author: mattiascremin (Mattia Scremin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think it would be a good idea to implement a widget that makes me see for every person on the team the time they spent in a period of time on a task.

Example:

Filter “person”

Project 1 - Task 1 - From 08:00 to 09:30
Project 2 - Task 4 - From 09:30 to 10:00
Project 3 - Task 2 From 11:00 to 12:00

posts.author: Brittni.WebCem (Brittni)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with this. Have you come up with any solution to this as of yet?

posts.author: Shamika_Khedkar (Shamika )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Karen,
If you are looking to get detailed view of time spent per person , you should try TimesheetsPro. Its a purpose built app for time tracking for monday.com.

Please reach out to me if you need a demo of app or anything else regarding app.

Best,
Shamika
